data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for retainage release upon 100% completion.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of a retainage release trigger upon 100% completion. However, the evidence provided does not include any API reads or checks that confirm the existence of this functionality. While the linked use case mentions the retainage release, it lacks concrete evidence of how this requirement is implemented or tested, leading to an inconclusive validation.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoint or functionality for triggering retainage release upon 100% completion.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the retainage release upon 100% completion.
